tool.summary: Generate images from structured text and optional visual inputs.
tool.description: A reusable community tool definition for image generation.

resource_setups.description: A reusable instruction resource prepared for this tool.
A reusable grouped reference resource prepared for this tool.

input_capabilities.description: Main text instruction or prompt used for generation.
One or more supporting images that can be used during generation.
Target ratio or size for the final output.

output_capabilities.description: Optional text returned by the tool if available.

notes: This is a reusable public community tool definition for Node Decrypt.
It does not include internal URLs, selectors, auth data, API keys, or hidden automation details.
